use_cases: Displaying real-time clock in dashboard or landing page headers
Adding interactive time display to productivity and task management apps
Creating decorative time elements for creative portfolios and portfolios
Implementing orbital-themed clock widgets in SaaS applications
Showing live time with smooth second hand animation in media sites
ai_summary: An elegant orbital clock component featuring smooth real-time animation with a three-hand clock face displaying hours, minutes, and seconds. The component includes interactive mouse-tracking parallax effects, supports both light and dark themes via CSS custom properties, and displays the current date. Built with React hooks for efficient time updates every 50ms, it offers a sophisticated blue-accented design with orbital hour markers suitable for modern web applications.
